from pathlib import Path
import tempfile, json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from sqlmodel import Session, create_engine, select
from agentic_workers.storage.backend_models import *
from agentic_workers.jobs.analyst_job import run_analyst_job, AnalystRunStatus
from agentic_workers.providers.github_provider import RepositoryReadme
from agentic_workers.providers.readme_analyst import ReadmeAnalysisUsage

tmp = Path\(tempfile.mkdtemp\(\)\)
db_url = f'sqlite:///{tmp / \\"test.db\\"}'
engine = create_engine\(db_url, connect_args={'check_same_thread': False}\)
SQLModel.metadata.create_all\(engine\)
session = Session\(engine\)

now = datetime\(2026, 3, 8, 12, 47, tzinfo=timezone.utc\)
session.add\(RepositoryIntake\(
    github_repository_id=707, owner_login='octocat', repository_name='analyze-me',
    full_name='octocat/analyze-me', repository_description='Test',
    queue_status=RepositoryQueueStatus.COMPLETED, triage_status=RepositoryTriageStatus.ACCEPTED,
    discovered_at=now, queue_created_at=now, status_updated_at=now, triaged_at=now,
\)\)
session.commit\(\)

class StubProvider:
    def get_readme\(self, **kw\):
        return RepositoryReadme\(owner_login='octocat', repository_name='analyze-me',
            content='# Product\\nWorkflow automation.', fetched_at=now,
            source_url='https://api.github.com/repos/octocat/analyze-me/readme'\)

class StaticAnalysis:
    provider_name = 'static'; model_name = 'static'
    last_usage = ReadmeAnalysisUsage\(\)
    def analyze\(self, **kw\):
        return '{\\"monetization_potential\\":\\"high\\",\\"pros\\":[\\"API\\"],\\"cons\\":[\\"Pricing\\"],\\"missing_feature_signals\\":[\\"billing\\"]}'

result = run_analyst_job\(session=session, provider=StubProvider\(\), runtime_dir=tmp / 'runtime', analysis_provider=StaticAnalysis\(\)\)
print\(f'Status: {result.status}'\)
print\(f'Outcomes: {len\(result.outcomes\)}'\)
for o in result.outcomes:
    print\(f'  {o.full_name}: {o.analysis_status} {o.failure_message}'\)

session.expire_all\(\)
row = session.get\(RepositoryIntake, 707\)
print\(f'DB status: {row.analysis_status if row else \\"NOT FOUND\\"} '\)
" 2>&1)

from pathlib import Path
import tempfile
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from sqlmodel import Session, create_engine
from agentic_workers.storage.backend_models import *
from agentic_workers.storage.analysis_store import list_pending_analysis_targets

tmp = Path\(tempfile.mkdtemp\(\)\)
db_url = f'sqlite:///{tmp / \\"test.db\\"}'
engine = create_engine\(db_url, connect_args={'check_same_thread': False}\)
SQLModel.metadata.create_all\(engine\)
session = Session\(engine\)

session.add\(AnalystSourceSettings\(id=1, firehose_enabled=True, backfill_enabled=False\)\)
now = datetime\(2026, 3, 8, 12, 48, tzinfo=timezone.utc\)
row = RepositoryIntake\(
    github_repository_id=708, owner_login='octocat', repository_name='fresh-analysis',
    full_name='octocat/fresh-analysis', repository_description='Automation platform for SaaS teams',
    queue_status=RepositoryQueueStatus.COMPLETED, triage_status=RepositoryTriageStatus.ACCEPTED,
    analysis_status=RepositoryAnalysisStatus.COMPLETED,
    discovered_at=now, queue_created_at=now, status_updated_at=now, triaged_at=now,
\)
session.add\(row\)
analyzed_at = datetime\(2026, 3, 8, 13, 48, tzinfo=timezone.utc\)
session.add\(RepositoryAnalysisResult\(
    github_repository_id=708, source_provider='github', source_kind='repository_readme',
    source_metadata={
        'analysis_schema_version': 'fast-analysis-v4',
        'analysis_mode': 'fast', 'analysis_outcome': 'completed',
        'analysis_evidence_version': 'fast-evidence-v1',
        'analysis_summary_short': 'Current evidence-backed analysis is present.',
        'score_breakdown': {'technical_maturity_score': 50},
        'analysis_provider': 'heuristic-readme-analysis',
        'analysis_model_name': None,
    },
    monetization_potential='medium', category=RepositoryCategory.WORKFLOW,
    agent_tags=['workflow'], analyzed_at=analyzed_at,
\)\)
session.commit\(\)

targets = list_pending_analysis_targets\(session\)
print\(f'Targets: {len\(targets\)}'\)
for t in targets:
    print\(f'  {t.full_name}: {t.analysis_status}'\)
" 2>&1)
